## Change Summary

Describe what changed and why.

---

## Review Requirements

Check all that apply:

- [ ] Governance review required
- [ ] Compliance review required
- [ ] Legal review required
- [ ] Privacy/Security review required
- [ ] Board approval or board record required
- [ ] Individual acknowledgement process required
- [ ] No additional review required beyond standard policy owner approval

---

## Approval Evidence

Approval is recorded through GitHub pull request review history, reviewer identity, timestamp, merge commit, and linked board or governance records where applicable.

**Approving reviewer(s):**  
**Board record / written consent reference, if applicable:**  
**Acknowledgement process reference, if applicable:**  

---

## Publication Checklist

- [ ] Policy page updated
- [ ] Policy Index updated, if needed
- [ ] Navigation updated in mkdocs.yml, if needed
- [ ] Manual signature fields removed or avoided
- [ ] Source records included, if applicable
- [ ] No sensitive non-public information included unless intended for public release
- [ ] Site build passes
